ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "lvd" TEXT /* Indicator of left ventricular dysfunction (e.g., +, ++) */,
  "svd" TEXT /* Indicator of systolic ventricular dysfunction (e.g., +, None) */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death for the patient */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of patient admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of patient discharge */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the hospital where the case is managed */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the primary physician managing the case */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Summary of the patient outcome (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case being observed */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "lvd" TEXT /* Indicator of left ventricular dysfunction */,
  "svd" TEXT /* Indicator of systolic ventricular dysfunction */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the physician who made the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., physical exam, lab test) */,
  "observation_result" TEXT /* Detailed result of the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the observation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_observations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_observations_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause of death (e.g., cardiovascular, neurological) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code for the cause */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cause of death was categorized */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality statistic entry */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of death */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases recorded for the cause */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patients (e.g., 0-10, 11-20) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the cases (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the statistic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_statistics_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the record */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of patient admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of patient discharge */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the physician who created the record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the hospital where the record was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the clinical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the clinical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_records_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_records_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the staff member */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the hospital where the staff member works */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the staff member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the staff member's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_cases" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff-case link */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case being managed */,
  "role_in_case" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the case (e.g., primary physician, consultant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the staff member was assigned to the case */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the staff-case link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_cases_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_cases_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit log entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case being visited */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member making the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., in-person, telehealth) */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  "visit_location" TEXT /* Location of the visit (e.g., hospital, home) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the visit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the visit log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comorbidity entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the comorbidity */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Description of the comorbidity condition */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date when the comorbidity was first diagnosed */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment for the comorbidity (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comorbidity was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the comorbidity record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comorbidities_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
